description: Summarizing the patch without defects or inspected surfaces is not a review.
body:
This hides blockers because the output sounds complete while no negative-path or line-level audit happened.

Use only as a diagnostic do-not-use signal; do not expose this as positive strategy, methodology, or memory. Use when a proposed approach skips diff hunks, line evidence, tests, contracts, and blast radius or claims success without domain evidence. Do not use this dossier as a positive implementation strategy; it is a do-not-use signal. Actions: block the shortcut, name the missing evidence, and switch to a safer methodology or ask for human approval. Validation signals include absence or contradiction in file/line citations, failing or missing tests, reproduced behavior, and residual-risk notes. Risk boundary: treat repeated recurrence as a blocker when it can cause unsupported findings, severity inflation, hidden fixes, and ignoring user constraints.
